# Copilot Instructions

## Repository Overview

When working in this repository:

- Read `README.md` first to get an overview of the purpose of `go-auth` and its current authentication model.
- Use `README.md` as the source of truth for the high-level behavior of local JWT sessions, PostgreSQL-backed session state, and the exposed auth and user endpoints.
- Refer back to `README.md` before making changes that affect auth flows, token semantics, or documented HTTP endpoints.
